source.name: thescottishfarmer.co.uk
source.title: JCB celebrates 80 years with employee festival | The Scottish Farmer

en.summary: JCB celebrated its 80th anniversary with an employee festival in Scotland.
en.why_irrelevant: Because industrial machinery news is far from competitive ferret racing.

zh.summary: JCB在苏格兰举办员工庆典，庆祝成立80周年。
zh.why_irrelevant: 因为工业机械新闻与竞技雪貂赛跑相去甚远。

brief: Actor Sam Neill dies at 78, a Bangkok bar fire kills at least 27, and Senator Lindsey Graham dies, while research explores AI coding assistants and brain-computer interfaces.
news_summary: Sam Neill, star of Jurassic Park, dies at 78; a Bangkok bar fire kills at least 27; Senator Lindsey Graham dies of an aortic tear, complicating Republican agenda; and Iran-U.S. strikes raise oil prices.
papers_summary: Papers cover AI coding assistants that give developers control, behavioral probing in mandatory wearables, micro-level AI feedback in tutoring, and a landscape analysis of brain-computer interface trials in China.

en.brief: Actor Sam Neill dies at 78, a Bangkok bar fire kills at least 27, and Senator Lindsey Graham dies, while research explores AI coding assistants and brain-computer interfaces.
en.news_summary: Sam Neill, star of Jurassic Park, dies at 78; a Bangkok bar fire kills at least 27; Senator Lindsey Graham dies of an aortic tear, complicating Republican agenda; and Iran-U.S. strikes raise oil prices.
en.papers_summary: Papers cover AI coding assistants that give developers control, behavioral probing in mandatory wearables, micro-level AI feedback in tutoring, and a landscape analysis of brain-computer interface trials in China.

zh.brief: 美国参议员格雷厄姆去世，曼谷酒吧火灾致27死，台风巴威袭击华北，伊朗与美国交火推高油价。学术方面，AI编程助手、可穿戴传感、脑机接口临床转化等研究发布。
zh.news_summary: 美国共和党参议员林赛·格雷厄姆因主动脉破裂去世，引发华盛顿政治震荡；曼谷酒吧大火至少27人死亡；台风巴威北上影响华北，河北多地洪涝；伊朗与美国相互打击，油价上涨。
zh.papers_summary: 计算机人类交互领域多项研究：AI编程助手可配置性、强制性可穿戴传感、脑机接口在中国临床转化分析等。

todays_image.caption: The sudden extinction of a political dinosaur mirrors the fossilized remains in the museum hall.
todays_image.title: Hall of Dinosaurs and Fossil Reptiles, Museum of Natural History
